creator: ivo@tonev.pro.br
text:
Brasilian mirrror - cvsup.br.freebsd.org - of FreeBSD´s ports is out os sync. 

There was no update of apache, php, sudo, ruby ( "actual" version are php5-5.3.9, apache-2.2.21, sudo-1.8.3_1, ruby-1.8.7.352_2,1 ).

How-To-Repeat: Update ports tree with cvsup.br.freebsd.org
